title: Converting Oracle data types to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates how to convert Oracle data types to PostgreSQL equivalents using Gemini as an AI tutor. The tutorial covers VARCHAR2, NUMBER, and DATE conversions with full precision and internationalization support, helping developers migrate applications to the cloud and improve PostgreSQL skills.
